identity.archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Tactile Organic elements

narrative: Tech meets poetry meets scrapbook diary - A tour guide metaphor.

heading_editorial.usage: Hero name, massive section titles. Gives the 'poetry/magazine' vibe.

handwriting.usage: Tour guide notes (e.g., 'Hi, since you\'re here...'), sticky notes, playful captions.

body_sans.usage: Main text, clean UI elements, tags.

layout_spacing.strategy: Asymmetric Bento/Collage. Elements should feel intentionally scattered yet aligned.
layout_spacing.spacing: Generous gaps (gap-8, gap-12), heavy padding inside cards (p-8).

surface_textures.paper_grain: SVG noise overlay or CSS mix-blend-mode grain over the background.
surface_textures.polaroid: bg-white p-3 pb-12 shadow-lg border border-gray-100, rotated slightly (-2deg, 3deg).
surface_textures.sticky_note: bg-[#fdf0a6] p-4 shadow-md font-caveat text-2xl text-gray-800 rotate-[2deg].
surface_textures.scrapbook_sticker: bg-white border-[3px] border-white rounded-xl shadow-sm text-sm px-3 py-1 font-bold inline-block

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Big pink editorial typography (Vanshika Saxena). A sticky note 'Hi, since you\'re here, let me be ya tour guide'. Profile photo styled as a Polaroid.

sections.name: About Me & Personality Cards
sections.description: Modular bento grid (warm cream/beige cards). Skill tags as floating scrapbook stickers. Clean sans-serif body.

sections.name: Timeline & Hackathons
sections.description: Vertical journey timeline, animated. Hackathon photo placed as a memory.

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Hover expansion cards. Tech stack stickers floating around the borders.

sections.name: Debate & Literature
sections.description: Scrapbook collage layout. Debate certificate and Speaking event photos layered over each other with tape or staple effects (CSS).

sections.name: Contact & Links
sections.description: EmailJS form styled like a torn diary page. Social links (Instagram, Medium) styled as big bold interactive stamps.

technical_rules.data_testid_requirement: ALL interactive elements, buttons, links, inputs, and major sections MUST have data-testid attributes using kebab-case role-based names.
technical_rules.animations: Use framer-motion for scroll reveals and hover micro-interactions. Ensure elements feel 'tactile' when hovered.
